headlines.title: Oil Tops $100 as Supply Crisis Deepens

headlines.summary: Brent crude has broken back above $100 a barrel for the first time in nearly two months as escalating attacks on commercial shipping in the Red Sea deepen concerns that the Middle East supply crisis is spreading beyond the Strait of Hormuz.
